recommendations.title: Under Her Control
recommendations.overview: When a fashion employee thinks she will have to end her promising career after getting pregnant, her boss offers to adopt the child.

recommendations.title: The Joker is Wild
recommendations.overview: A Prohibition-era nightclub crooner has his career is cut short when his throat is slashed by a mob boss.

recommendations.title: Free Fall
recommendations.overview: A promising career with the police, a baby on the way... Marc's life seems to be right on track. Then he meets fellow policeman Kay and during their regular jogs Marc experiences a never-before-felt sense of ease and effortlessness – and what it mean

recommendations.title: Ip Man: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: When a young Master Ip stops a kidnapping, he ignites a turf war with a ruthless human-trafficking ring. In retaliation, the gang kidnaps one of Ip Man's close friends, forcing him to face the group's brutal boxing champion head-on.

recommendations.title: Agneepath
recommendations.overview: When his father is lynched by a mob after being framed by a gangster, a young boy leaves his village along with his pregnant mother  and flees to Mumbai. He takes up a life of crime and swears to avenge his father. A remake of the 1990 film.

recommendations.title: The Grandmaster
recommendations.overview: Ip Man's peaceful life in Foshan changes after Gong Yutian seeks an heir for his family in Southern China. Ip Man then meets Gong Er who challenges him for the sake of regaining her family's honor. After the Second Sino-Japanese War, Ip Man moves to

recommendations.title: Ghost Dog: The Way of the Samurai
recommendations.overview: A Black hitman who models after the samurai of old finds himself targeted for death by the mob.

recommendations.title: 10th & Wolf
recommendations.overview: A former street thug returns to his Philadelphia home after a stint in the military. Back on his home turf, he once again finds himself tangling with the mob boss who was instrumental in his going off to be a soldier.

recommendations.title: Demon City
recommendations.overview: Framed for his family's murder and left for dead, an ex-hitman will stop at nothing to exact revenge on the masked "demons" who have taken over his city.

recommendations.title: Django, Prepare a Coffin
